form.formComment: Recent form impressive for this race. Freshened for 31 days. Last outing finished fourth of 11 starters at Cheltenham in the G1 Supreme Novices Hurdle on March 10 over 3300m, 7 len behind Old Park Star with 73kg at $34. Run before won by 2.5 len Kempton Park on January 10 over 3200m defeating Kocktail Bleu carrying 72.5kg at $1.70 in a hurdle. Dangerous.

form.formComment: Last start finished fifth of 23 starters at Cheltenham on March 13 over 3400m, slow track; 6 len behind Wilful carrying 66kg at $5.50. The run before tracked on the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 5 len Warwick on February 20 over 3800m slow track defeating Four Springs carrying 73.5kg at $1.40 in a hurdle. Will be up there.

form.formComment: Racing well. Freshened for 31 days. Last start finished second of 11 starters at Cheltenham in the G1 Supreme Novices Hurdle on March 10 over 3300m, 1.5 len behind Old Park Star carrying 73kg at $5.50. The run to post a big 27 len win. Newbury on February 7 over 3300m on heavy going defeating Kadastral carrying 75.5kg at $1.30 in a hurdle. Leading contender.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last preparation 7 of 12 starters at Leopardstown in the G1 Tattersalls Ireland Novice Hurdle February 1 over 3218m, on heavy track; 10 len behind Talk The Talk carrying 75.5kg at $26. Previous preparation first-up won by 4.5 len Limerick December 26 over 3218m in the wet defeating Laurets D'estruval carrying 69.5kg at $1.80. Can bounce back.

form.formComment: Last to post a big 3.5 len win. Newbury on March 21 over 3800m defeating Glancing Jack carrying 76kg at $4.30 in a hurdle. Race before finished seventh of 12 runners at Kempton Park in the G2 Dovecote Novices' Hurdle on February 21 over 3200m, 25 len behind Klub De Reve carrying 72kg at $10. May struggle back up in grade.

form.formComment: Resumes off a 29 day letup. Last run finished 14th of 22 runners at Cheltenham in the G2 Dawn Run Mares' Novices' Hurdle on March 12 over 3400m, 18 len behind White Noise carrying 71.5kg at $11. Race before finished second in a small field at Ascot in the G2 Warfield Mares' Hurdle on January 17 over 3160m, slow track; 0.5 len behind Ooh Betty carrying 71.5kg at $2. Can?t enthuse.
